name: Dinner Rolls- Pan-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first five ingredients inside the bread pan. Add liquid ingredients. Close cover and place dry yeast into the yeast holder.
2. Select: BASIC DOUGH MODE. Press start. (The Breadmaker completes the basic dough mode in 2 hours and 25 minutes.)
3. Divide the dough into 12 equal portions. Roll each portion into a ball. Cover with plastic wrap and rest for 20 minutes.
